ddls:
CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Registration status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conveners" (
  "convener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convener */,
  "convener_name" TEXT /* Name of the convener */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the convener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_title" TEXT /* Title of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., workshop, oral) */,
  "convener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convener organizing the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the session page */,
  "markdown_link" TEXT /* Markdown-formatted link with session details */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_convener_id FOREIGN KEY ("convener_id") REFERENCES conveners ("convener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session related to the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., presentation, handout) */,
  "file_link" TEXT /* Link to the material file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for registration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user registering for the session */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session the user is registering for */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when registration occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for attendance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the session */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session attended */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session the feedback is related to */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., pending, processed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the session type (e.g., workshop, oral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the related session */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session for which analytics are tracked */,
  "total_registrations" INTEGER /* Total number of registrations for the session */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total number of attendees for the session */,
  "session_rating" REAL /* Average rating received for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session related to the link */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_links_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendee_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interest entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user indicating interest */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session the user is interested in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendee_interests_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendee_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendee_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the connection entry */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the connection */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the connection */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session that led to the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendee_connections_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendee_connections_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendee_connections_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the preference */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session related to the preference */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session the sponsor is associated with */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website link for the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_sponsors_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_feedback_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the response entry */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related feedback entry */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question posed in the feedback form */,
  "response" TEXT /* User's response to the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_responses_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedbacks ("feedback_id")
)
